subject: A large, powerfully built humanoid warrior lunging forward across an industrial railing, screaming with exertion, channeling glowing magenta energy from one hand while a red tendril trails behind
description: A heavily muscled humanoid figure in studded brown leather armor lunges aggressively across a metal railing or bridge structure, mouth open in a roar or battle cry. One hand is extended forward, generating a pulsing construct of glowing pink-magenta energy with tendrils radiating outward. A vivid red whip-like tendril or energy stream trails dramatically behind the figure. The background is an industrial or mechanical setting under a bright blue sky. The figure's arms and upper body are heavily scarred and show signs of hard labor or combat. The composition is close to mid-shot, dynamic diagonal thrust from right to left.
foreground: armored humanoid warrior lunging with magenta energy in hand
emotion: intense aggression, battle rage — open-mouthed roar
vision_uncertainty: figure-details partially obscured by dynamic motion and energy glow
